🇮🇷 An Iranian woman at a public gathering: "The weakness and desperation Trump has fallen into shows signs of dementia. He thought that with the martyrdom of our leader, the Iranian nation would fall to its knees." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

⚡️ 🇧🇭 🇵🇰 Bahrain’s Foreign Minister Dr. Abdullatif Al-Zayani held a phone call with Pakistan’s Foreign Minister Muhammad Ishaq Dar. They discussed ways to strengthen bilateral cooperation and coordinate on regional developments amid continued Iranian missile and drone attacks on Bahrain and GCC countries. Both stressed the importance of joint diplomatic efforts in international forums, including their current non-permanent seats on the UN Security Council. @wfwitness
Open Source Intel An Iranian drone reportedly bearing a tribute to Tupac. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2040513430675751177/photo/1 tweet

OSINTdefender India’s Oil and Natural Gas Ministry has announced the purchase of both crude oil and liquefied petroleum gas from Iran amid the ongoing war in the Middle East and the blockage of the Strait of Hormuz, constituting the first purchase of energy products from Iran in several years by India. This announcement follows last month’s lifting of sanctions levied against Iranian tankers by the U.S. Treasury Department. tweet

Open Source Intel Lindsey Graham: I just had a great conversation with Trump. I totally support his ultimatum to the Iranian regime to open up the Strait of Hormuz and to do a peace deal. A massive military operation awaits Iran if they choose poorly. This regime has been severely crippled through Operation Epic Fury. Their reign of terror against the region and the world needs to come to an end, hopefully through a peace deal. After speaking with President Trump this morning, I am completely convinced that he will use overwhelming military force against the regime if they continue to impede the Strait of Hormuz and refuse a diplomatic solution to achieve our military objectives. If it’s not clear to Iran and others by now that President Trump means what he says then I don’t know when it will ever be. Choose wisely. tweet
Open Source Intel According to the NYT, Europe may deploy minesweepers to the Strait of Hormuz after hostilities subside. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2040512213870338127/photo/1 tweet

⚡️ 🇾🇪 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Houthi‑led Yemeni armed forces military spokesperson Yahya Saree announced a fifth joint military operation with Iran’s Revolutionary Guard and army and Hezbollah, targeting Lod airport in the Jaffa area and other military objectives in southern Israel using a ballistic missile and drones. The statement said the operation was successful and that forces will continue within the resistance axis until victory is achieved. @wfwitness

🇮🇱 Northern Command Commander in Closed Conversation: "We Were Surprised by Hezbullah, the Regime in Iran is Stable"

🇫🇷 🗣 Politico: France intends to increase its stockpiles of missiles and drones by four times by 2030 The newspaper notes that next week the French government will present an updated law on military planning, which provides for the allocation of €8.5 billion for drones and missiles until 2030. The document represents a multi-year financial framework that defines the goals of arms procurement and development. France plans to increase its stockpiles of cruise missiles, including "kamikaze drones", by 400%, guided bombs AASM Hammer produced by Safran - by 240%, and Aster and Mica missiles - by 30%. Also, the publication reports that Paris is considering the development of a new tank, which is supposed to replace the Leclerc tank. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "⭕بالفيديو | مشاهد من عملية استهداف المقاومة الإسلامية دبّابتي ميركافا تابعتين لجيش العدو الإسرائيلي في وادي العيون جنوب لبنان بمحلّقات انقضاضيّة." Beautiful valley. First tank's track is hit and forced for repairs. Smoke gets deployed to tow away tank The tank defending the towing is hit in the tower area. Limited damage. Trophy asleep in both cases. Where are all the trophy jerkers? Can't wait to see FPVs vs Soldiers
Trump: “If you import The Third World, you become The Third World!” — AND THAT’S NOT GOING TO HAPPEN TO THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA AS LONG AS I AM PRESIDENT.
🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Launches from Iran
According to Israeli media the missile impacted in an “open area.”

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇺🇳 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has written to the UN Secretary‑General and the Security Council detailing repeated US‑Israeli attacks on Iranian nuclear facilities, including strikes on Natanz (1 and 21 March), the Bushehr plant (24 and 27 March, plus a nearby strike on 17 March), the Khondab heavy water plant and the Shahid Ahmadi‑Roshan uranium processing site. He warned that attacks near the active Bushehr reactor risk a radiological release with catastrophic human and environmental consequences for the entire region. Araghchi criticised the IAEA Director-General Grossi for “dangerous” remarks suggesting the use of nuclear weapons against Iran, and said the agency’s inaction has encouraged further aggression. He warned that member states may lose confidence in the UN, the IAEA and the non‑proliferation regime if attacks on safeguarded facilities continue to go unpunished. @wfwitness
⭕ بالفيديو | مشاهد من عملية استهداف المقاومة الإسلامية دبّابتي ميركافا تابعتين لجيش العدو الإسرائيلي في وادي العيون جنوب لبنان بمحلّقات انقضاضيّة. #الإعلام_الحربي

🇺🇸 The USA announced losses of personnel in the war with Iran. According to the published data from the Pentagon, 13 servicemen were killed, and another 365 were injured. Distribution of the injured: ground forces - 247, navy - 63, marine corps - 19, air force - 36. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Netanyahu stated that Israel and the United States have destroyed 70% of Iran's production facilities: I promised you that we would continue to undermine the regime in Tehran, and that's exactly what we're doing. After we destroyed 70 percent of their steel production capacity, which serves as their raw material and weapon against us, we also attacked their petrochemical plants. These two facilities are our money-making machine for financing the terrorist war against us and the entire world. We will continue to undermine them, as I promised, with the upcoming holidays. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇮🇷 🛸 IRIB report on the often imitated, never duplicated Shahed drone: "More than six countries are in research and production stages of copied versions of it. Even America put a copy on its agenda, they named it 'Lucas.' When it came to action, unlike the Iranian version, it failed and was shot down one by one in Iranian skies." The Shahed, radar-evading, AI-guided, anti-jamming equipped, has now struck targets in the occupied territories across every True Promise operation. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
🇮🇷 Signatures on ammunition in Persian Text in Farsi on the drone: "I, Shahid-136, on behalf of the Iranian people, am going to Tel Aviv for negotiations." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇱🇧 The IDF has issued an urgent evacuation warning for the Masnaa border crossing on the Syrian-Lebanese border, threatening imminent strikes. All those in the marked red zone on Highway M30 ordered to evacuate immediately. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iran’s Attorney General Movahedi-Azad said more than 7,000 public reports regarding espionage and individuals linked to foreign countries have been received by the judiciary’s reporting system. Necessary orders have been issued to review and process the reports quickly. He praised the public’s solidarity and cooperation following recent events, noting that the "martyrdom" of the nation’s leader has strengthened national unity. @wfwitness
